macro.title: New home applications fall 3% as mortgage rates top 6.5%
macro.what: MBA's Builder Application Survey reported new home purchase apps down 3% from April and up 3.8% year over year.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: HUD aims to help multi-story manufactured housing go vertical
housing.what: HUD proposed a rule to allow chassis free upper floors in manufactured homes, a change developers say can cut $5,000 to $10,000 per home.
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: Exclusive: House Democrat reintroduces bill targeting mortgage credit access
housing.what: The reintroduced legislation would require lenders to use consumer-permissioned data, rental and bank records, for applicants who request it.

housing.title: Housing Payments Hit 1-Year High, Sending Buyers to the Sidelines
housing.what: Pending home sales fell for the fifth week in a row, and new listings declined, too
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.

housing.title: Florida Dominates May’s Most Expensive Home Sales, Led by a $75 Million Boca Raton Deal
housing.what: A Boca Raton mansion within a private golf course community and two apartments in New York City are among May’s most expensive home sales
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: SpaceX Employees Could Buy 2 in 5 San Antonio Homes With Their IPO Windfall
housing.what: The massive IPO would create enough wealth for SpaceX employees to buy roughly 40% of all the homes in San Antonio, one of the closest major metros to where the company is headquartered
